project.name: Read-Out-Loud
project.status: v1.3.0 - Material 3 UI & Reading Progress Complete

api_endpoints.logic: Model-First Strategy (Try all keys for one model before next model)

features: TTS Karaoke highlighting with orange background & bold text
Auto-scroll to current word with smart 3s interaction delay
Read-only Text Area by default (Double-tap to Edit)

patterns: Material 3 Design Guidelines (Surface Containers, Tonal Buttons)
TTS Progress Broadcast: Service calculates absolute progress across text chunks
Efficient Highlight: Using BackgroundColorSpan & clearHighlight for low UI overhead
Interaction-Aware Scroll: postDelayed runnable handles 3s auto-scroll resume
gotchas: onRangeStart callback for TTS requires absolute offset calculation when text is chunked
Material 3 style names differ slightly (e.g., TonalButton vs FilledTonalButton in older docs)
DataBinding requires full project rebuild after major layout refactors to sync view IDs
ObjectAnimator on scrollY needs careful layout inspection to avoid off-screen jump
